## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a major version bump)
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's TypeScript and import conventions
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`pnpm check:types`)
- [ ] Lint/format checks pass (`pnpm check`)
- [ ] I have added a changeset if this is a user-facing change (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if applicable
